title: lodhra xanthophylla
intro: Lodhra xanthophylla, also known as Lodhara, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lythraceae. It is commonly found in the Himalayan region and is used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Lodhra xanthophylla include its ability to manage menstrual disorders, reduce inflammation and pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lodhra xanthophylla include decoctions, powders, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including menstrual irregularities and skin disorders.
